title: Department of Software Engineering (English) - Message from the Head of the Department
content:
Department of Software Engineering (English) - Message from the Head of the Department

Dear Students,

In today’s world, software engineering is not just a profession; it has become a driving force shaping the future, especially through artificial intelligence applications. As the academic staff of the Software Engineering Department at Istanbul Esenyurt University, our mission is to equip you not only with knowledge but also with an innovative perspective and a strong ethical foundation in this ever-evolving technological world.

Our goal is to provide world-class education in areas such as algorithm-based software development, artificial intelligence, data science, cybersecurity, automation, remote threat detection, and cloud technologies, while preparing our students for a strong future both academically and professionally.

To achieve this, we place great emphasis on research and development projects, the advancement of autonomous systems, interactive virtual applications, industry collaborations, and entrepreneurship. We invite you to join the Software Engineering Department at Istanbul Esenyurt University, where you can actively lead the technological future that lies ahead.

Remember: The power to code the smart systems of tomorrow is in your hands!

With Love and Respect,

Dr. Cahit KARAKUŞ

Head of Department

Software Engineering Department

This content was updated on 29/07/2025.
